behaviors.description: Generated function signature matches expected interface from the natural-language spec.
behaviors.justification: Failure depends on real LLM output quality (signature adherence). A deterministic stub can only replay a fixed signature and can hide real mismatches. Rejected Workflow: behavior checks one model decision (single generation), not a multi-agentic chain.
behaviors.test_description: Run live generation for prompts with explicit required parameter names/types/return type, parse produced code signature, and assert exact interface match.

behaviors.description: Attempts execute in order and orchestration returns immediately on first passing attempt.
behaviors.justification: Primary risk is module handoff/state control between orchestrator, attempt runner, and result handling. In-process stubs can expose ordering and early-exit bugs. Rejected System: no required real OS/network/subprocess in behavior text. Rejected Agentic: correctness is orchestration logic, not model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Wire orchestrator with stubbed generator and stubbed test executor that fail then pass; assert attempt sequence is 1->2 and attempt 3 is never invoked.

behaviors.description: Live iterative loop can succeed within allowed attempts even when one-shot generation usually fails.
behaviors.justification: Requires multiple real agentic decisions in sequence (initial generation plus refinement iterations) with outcome dependent on live LLM behavior across steps. Rejected Agentic: single-step agentic test cannot verify iterative recovery behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Run end-to-end live loop on a known task with low first-pass success; assert at least one run reaches passing tests by attempt <=3 and records intermediate failures.

behaviors.description: Refinement prompt includes failed test names and failure messages after a failed attempt.
behaviors.justification: Bug appears at boundary between test-result capture and prompt-construction wiring. Deterministic fixtures are sufficient; no real model call is needed to detect missing failure context in the next prompt. Rejected Agentic: behavior text targets prompt payload contents, not model judgment.
behaviors.test_description: Execute one failed attempt with controlled failing test output, build next prompt through real orchestration path, and assert prompt contains each failed test name and failure message.

behaviors.description: Next live attempt changes code in response to prior failure context instead of resubmitting identical implementation.
behaviors.justification: Needs sequential agentic behavior: first attempt fails, failure context is passed, second model decision should adapt output. A stubbed model would trivially pass/fail without testing adaptation. Rejected Agentic: single-call agentic test cannot validate cross-attempt response to prior context.
behaviors.test_description: Run live two-attempt flow where attempt 1 fails, then compare attempt 1 vs attempt 2 code and assert substantive change tied to cited failure context.

behaviors.description: Service stops after 3 failed attempts and returns structured error containing all attempts and test results.
behaviors.justification: This is deterministic control-flow and data aggregation across modules (loop controller, result store, error serializer). Stubs can force three failures and verify structure. Rejected System: no behavior-specific need for real OS/network/subprocess. Rejected Agentic: no dependence on model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Use stubbed generator/test runner that always fail; run pipeline and assert exactly 3 attempts executed and error payload includes per-attempt code/test-result entries.

behaviors.description: Full non-agentic pipeline wiring (generate call, test execution, attempt bookkeeping) works end-to-end with deterministic stubbed model outputs.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly includes end-to-end test execution; real failure boundary commonly includes subprocess/filesystem/runtime invocation that in-process fakes can hide. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: behavior text explicitly says non-agentic and deterministic stubbed model outputs.
behaviors.test_description: Run service end-to-end with deterministic model stub but real test execution path (actual runner invocation and temp workspace/files), then assert expected pass/fail bookkeeping and outputs.

behaviors.description: Full live loop (generate, test, refine, retest) solves at least one known hard function that fails on first attempt.
behaviors.justification: This is an explicit multi-step live agent pipeline with repeated model decisions and feedback handoff. Only a workflow-level test can catch failures in cross-step adaptation and convergence. Rejected Agentic: single-step agentic coverage cannot validate full loop solve behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Run live end-to-end iterative generation on a curated hard benchmark known to fail first attempt; assert first attempt fails and later attempt within limit passes all tests.
